canonical_definition: An evaluation procedure to test watermark resilience where words in the generated text are replaced with their synonyms using models like BERT or lexical databases like WordNet.
papers: BiMark: Unbiased Multilayer Watermarking for Large Language Models
Robust Multi-bit Text Watermark with LLM-based Paraphrasers

definitions.text: An evaluation procedure to test watermark resilience where words in the generated text are replaced with their synonyms using models like BERT or lexical databases like WordNet.
definitions.paper: BiMark: Unbiased Multilayer Watermarking for Large Language Models

definitions.text: An evaluation protocol for robustness where a specified percentage of tokens in a watermarked text are randomly replaced with other tokens from the vocabulary before attempting to decode the watermark.
definitions.paper: Robust Multi-bit Text Watermark with LLM-based Paraphrasers

characterization: An evaluation procedure to test watermark resilience where words in the generated text are replaced with their synonyms using models like BERT or lexical databases like WordNet.

icml25: BiMark: Unbiased Multilayer Watermarking for Large Language Models
